text: The missile's deployment sparked uproar from Kyiv's Western allies - Florent VERGNES - Updated [0](/news/national_news/the-missiles-deployment-sparked-uproar-from-kyivs-western-allies/image_a52b72a7-f59c-5474-a7b1-a8200b2aa127.html#comments) Tags As featured on Russian President Vladimir Putin on Friday promised more combat test-firing of an experimental hypersonic missile launched at Ukraine, as Volodymyr Zelensky appealed for updated air-defence systems to meet the new threat.
